name: paperclip-plugin-3cx-tools
description: Paperclip plugin that exposes 3CX PBX operations (queue depth, parked calls, today's stats, agent presence, call history, click-to-call, park/transfer/hangup, realtime WebSocket events) as agent tools. Multi-account, multi-company-mode (single / manual / native), per-account company isolation, mutations gated.
author: Barry Carr & Tony Allard
